utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: - health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with explicit monthly costs; satisfied. - property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance and a tech add-on with monthly costs; satisfies 'home/contents insurance with costs'. - travel_coverage: specifies a travel insurance plan with monthly cost; satisfied. - additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs; plan lists an enhancement service but marked 'Not chosen due to cost' with no cost provided; not fully specified. - total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual cost breakdown; satisfied. Therefore, 4 out of 5 are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan lists four specific items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings. They are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (Physical Health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (Mental Health), LifeFirst Standard Coverage (Home Content), Technology Protection (Add-on), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (Travel Insurance). From the ground-truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health has rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Plan under primary_health_coverage.mental_health has rating 4; LifeFirst Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content has rating 9; Technology Protection under property_enhancement_services has rating 8; PrimeTravel Premium Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 3.
